Off Calendar Sep-26-2023 Continued To Nov-21-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Phil Foster appeared via zoom for and with Caroline Lotze (petitioner).
Edward Koplowitz appeared via zoom for Ralph, Ashley, Kevin Kronert. (respondents).

Mr. Foster stated that he has not received a legible copy of the prior trust, that he would like to discuss with Mr. Koplowitz on a future trial date, and that both parties agree to mediation.

The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than February 06, 2024. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by February 13, 2024. The matter is continued to November 21, 2023 and the Parties are to return on February 21, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

The joint status report is to address status of mediation, any outstanding discovery issues and timelines, what the claims are, the factual issues, the time estimate of the evidentiary hearing, who the witnesses will be and time estimates of witness testimony.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Cabrera. Not reported.
